name: Smooth Fence USA
description: Fence installation and repair contractor based in Palm Coast, Florida. Serves Flagler, Volusia, St. Johns, Duval, and Putnam counties.

supportedInterfaces.description: Public website. Serves HTML pages with structured-data LocalBusiness JSON-LD.
Markdown twins of public pages. Each main HTML page has a sibling .md file with the same content rendered as markdown for agent consumption.
Agent Skill describing Smooth Fence USA — services, areas, pricing approach, financing, warranty, and quote process.
No public OpenAPI surface in Phase A. A business-side MCP server is planned for the agent.smoothfenceusa.com subdomain in Phase B.

license: All rights reserved — content is for agent reading and search indexing. See /privacy for policy.
